atoms.semantic_claim: The first old divergence hunk in this file is a rustfmt-only semicolon insertion.
atoms.equivalence_argument: Formatting-only change has no semantic mapping requirement.

atoms.semantic_claim: The old divergence adds `RethRpcModule::Ritual` so CLI/config module selection can parse and propagate the Ritual JSON-RPC namespace.

destinations.evidence: Destination `RethRpcModule` enum now has a `Ritual` variant, includes it in `STANDARD_VARIANTS`, maps `AsRef<str>` to `ritual`, and parses `ritual` in `FromStr`.

atoms.equivalence_argument: Exact: the destination can select the Ritual RPC module through standard RPC module configuration.
atoms.negative_test_candidate: Parsing module selection containing `ritual` should fail while the variant is missing.
atoms.notes: Resolved by adding `RethRpcModule::Ritual` and parser/validator coverage.

summary: The Ritual RPC module selection enum variant is restored in the destination; the other hunk is formatting-only.
